title: Surgeon Vacancy at Shroff Eye Centre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Shroff Eye Centre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!
